name: MXC Sandbox Execution
description: OS-level sandboxed tool execution via MXC for MXC-capable hosts: runs commands in ProcessContainer (Windows), Bubblewrap (Linux via process), or Seatbelt (macOS, experimental) with user and machine sandbox policy files.

mxcBinaryPath.description: Override auto-discovery of wxc-exec (Windows), the MXC Linux executor, or mxc-exec-mac (macOS)

network.description: Use none for default-deny networking, or default to allow outbound networking

timeoutSeconds.description: Explicit per-command timeout in seconds. When omitted, the resolved sandbox baseline timeout applies.

readwritePaths.description: Additional filesystem paths to grant read-write access
